data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The evidence indicates that while the referrer (Sarah) receives a reward for referring a friend, there is no confirmation that the referred friend also receives a reward. The requirement explicitly states that both the referrer and referee should receive rewards, but the linked use case only details the reward for the referrer and does not mention any reward for the friend who booked the service. This indicates a gap in the requirement coverage for dual-sided rewards, as outlined in the needs section of the linked use case.
gaps: No evidence of a reward for the referee (friend who booked).

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
